book.title: Doctor Who The The Secret In Vault 13
book.author: David Solomons
book.description: A novel about the Secret in Vault 13.

book.title: Romeo and Juliet
book.author: William Shakespear
book.description: A tragic play about two young lovers.

book.title: Harry Potter
book.author: J.K. Rowling
book.description: A fantasy story about a young wizard.

book.title: Naruto
book.author: Masashi Kishimoto
book.description: A manga series about a young ninja.
